refresh_interval.label: Refresh interval
refresh_interval.description: How often Mini Docker refreshes Docker state, in seconds.

default_network.label: Default network
default_network.description: Network selected when running an image.

show_count.label: Show running count
show_count.description: Show the number of running containers beside the Docker icon.

glyph_color.label: Icon color
glyph_color.description: Theme color used by the Docker icon.

status_mode.label: Status indicator
status_mode.description: Choose when the status dot is visible.

active_color.label: Active indicator color
active_color.description: Color used when at least one container is running.

inactive_color.label: Inactive indicator color
inactive_color.description: Color used when no containers are running.

panel.select_hint: Select an item to see available actions.

run_form.title: Run {image}
run_form.environment_help: Enter one KEY=value pair per line.
run_form.invalid_name: Container names may contain letters, numbers, dots, underscores, and hyphens.
run_form.invalid_port: Port must be a number from 1 to 65535.

result.docker_missing: The Docker CLI is not installed.
result.docker_unreachable: Could not reach the Docker daemon.
result.command_busy: Another Docker command is still running.
